title: Block Gap Fix
description: Fixes not having a texture on certain connected blocks
body:
## Explanation
Some blocks in minecraft don't have textures on the insides of them. This means that if you want to build with these blocks using the debug stick or another tool like axiom, it will look ugly! This adds back the texture without creating any additional lag by still allowing these unseen faces to cull against other blocks.

## Showcase
**Without Pack**
![Doors without pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ac954397a26d69e3e2ef2b7fae5806731371a0f.png)
**With Pack**
![Doors with pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23af17fa15a7c6c83739720c6f40e63e9b707cad.png)

## Information
If you want to suggest something added to this pack, report a bug or interact with the community, join [my discord](https://discord.gg/gymTft2GbV)
